title: mariscus sumatrensis var. evolutior
intro: Mariscus sumatrensis var. evolutior, also known as the lesser club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the lycopodiophyta division. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mariscus sumatrensis var. evolutior include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
